title: Docs product pack — fabric-os
principle: Product experience SoR lives under docs/product/. Foundation holds why; business holds market and ICP; product holds personas, JTBD, workflows, journeys, and UX research. Technical design-system specs remain under docs/architecture/specs/design/.

requiredRootFiles.role: index + cross-ref table (foundation ↔ business ↔ product ↔ architecture)
repo-local provisioning mirror of this pack

ux.purpose: Personas, jobs-to-be-done, workflows, journeys, information architecture, UX research
forbidden: GTM ICP prose — belongs in docs/business/customers/

prds.purpose: Product requirement documents — narrative PRDs linked from pm/product/

roadmap.purpose: Product roadmap narrative — executive summary links foundation/roadmap.md

forbiddenAtProductRoot: Loose narrative *.md except README.md and FOLDER-SPEC.md
Duplicate business ICP or pricing prose

constitution-standards.allowed: docs/product/README.md pointer to fleet product repos and ecosystem-os

referenceDecompose.docs/architecture/specs/design/ux-resear: relocate → docs/product/ux/ (pointer stub left in architecture)
